description: The `WindowsExplorer` DSC resource is used to manage Windows Explorer settings.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `WindowsExplorer` DSC resource is used to manage Windows Explorer settings.

FileExtensions.title: FileExtensions
FileExtensions.description: Shows or hides file extensions in File Explorer. Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

HiddenFiles.title: HiddenFiles
HiddenFiles.description: Shows or hides hidden files and folders in File Explorer. Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

ItemCheckBoxes.title: ItemCheckBoxes
ItemCheckBoxes.description: Shows or hides item checkboxes in File Explorer. Defaults to `KeepCurrentValue`.

RestartExplorer.title: RestartExplorer
RestartExplorer.description: Specifies whether to restart Windows Explorer to apply changes. Defaults to `$false`.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/WindowsExplorer
